name: Quinoa Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Butter or bacon fat, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Prepare quinoa meal by grinding raw quinoa in a blender.
3. Combine all dry ingredients (quinoa meal, corn meal, salt, baking soda, baking powder, honey or brown sugar) in a large bowl.
4. In another bowl, whisk together the egg and melted butter (or bacon fat).
5. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined.
6. Grease a 9-inch x 9-inch pan or a greased muffin tin.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan(s) and spread evenly.
8. Bake for about 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Serve hot with additional butter. For a spicier variation, add optional green chilies or jalapeno-and-tomato relish.
